message:
feat(core): Implement Path<T> extractor for path parameter extraction

Add typed path parameter extraction from URL paths with serde integration:

- PathParams: Storage type for extracted path parameters
- Path<T>: Extractor that deserializes params to any DeserializeOwned type
- PathDeserializer: Custom serde deserializer supporting:
  - Single values: Path<i64> extracts first param
  - Tuples: Path<(String, i64)> extracts by position
  - Structs: Path<MyStruct> extracts by field name
- PathExtractError: Comprehensive error handling with HTTP status codes
- 17 unit tests covering all extraction modes and error cases

Closes fastapi_rust-152

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
